_comment: Upstream routing directory: who owns each core product, where to notify them, and where the tracking item lives. Maintainers fill owner/channel/tracker (left as TBD until confirmed — these are internal pointers). Used as the reference for the `Routed to:` / `Owner:` / `Upstream link:` evidence block in .github/TRIAGE.md so routing doesn't depend on tribal knowledge. Ecosystem dApps are record-only and route to the dApp's own channel, so they are not listed here.
